last_updated_focus: Refined top-level workflow, project-spec schema, route shortlist/route-out logic, prospective design planning, and architecture-level documentation.
notes: Preliminary skill package. The top-level workflow now emphasizes user need, data structure, route shortlist, subskill activation, route-out handling, and tool fit/data suitability before causal claims. Subskills 01 (randomized experiments), 03 (matching/weighting/balance), and 09 (instrumental variables) are deeply expanded. Subskill 18 adds a lightweight prospective design-planning workflow. Test package-specific code before production use.
